mapper.select: select `b`.`index` as `index`, `b`.`emp_id` as `empId`, `u`.`name` as `name`, `u`.`role_code` as `roleCode`, `b`.`type` as `type`, `b`.`title` as `title`, `b`.`content` as `content`, `b`.`view` as `view`, `b`.`created_at` as `createdAt` from `wh`.`boards` b join `wh`.`users` u on b.`emp_id` = u.`emp_id` where b.`is_deleted` = false and b.`index` = #{id}

select b.`index` as `index`, b.`emp_id` as `empId`, u.`name` as `name`, u.`role_code` as `roleCode`, b.`type` as `type`, b.`title` as `title`, b.`content` as `content`, b.`view` as `view`, b.`created_at` as `createdAt` from `wh`.`boards` b join `wh`.`users` u on b.`emp_id` = u.`emp_id` where b.is_deleted = false order by b.`index` desc limit #{size} offset #{offset}

select `b`.`index` as `index`, `b`.`emp_id` as `empId`, `u`.`name` as `name`, `b`.`type` as `type`, `b`.`title` as `title`, `b`.`content` as `content`, `b`.`view` as `view`, `b`.`created_at` as `createdAt`, `b`.`updated_at` as `updatedAt`, `b`.`is_deleted` as `isDeleted` from `wh`.`boards` `b` join `wh`.`users` `u` on `b`.`emp_id` = `u`.`emp_id` where `b`.`type` = 1 and `b`.`is_deleted` = false order by `b`.`index` desc

select `b`.`index` as `index`, `b`.`emp_id` as `empId`, `u`.`name` as `name`, `b`.`type` as `type`, `b`.`title` as `title`, `b`.`content` as `content`, `b`.`view` as `view`, `b`.`created_at` as `createdAt`, `b`.`updated_at` as `updatedAt`, `b`.`is_deleted` as `isDeleted` from `wh`.`boards` `b` join `wh`.`users` `u` on `b`.`emp_id` = `u`.`emp_id` where `b`.`type` = 2 and `b`.`is_deleted` = false order by `b`.`index` desc
select count(*) from `wh`.`boards` where is_deleted = false
